title: EmbedPolicy
description: Policy controlling how manifest data is embedded into media files.

prompt_visibility.description: Controls whether prompts are included in embedded manifests. Mirrors PromptVisibility.

embed_mode.description: full=embed entire manifest, pointer=embed only URI+hash, none=no embedding.

include_params.description: Whether to include generation parameters in embedded manifest.

include_seed.description: Whether to include the random seed in embedded manifest.
